label: 1550 CE
era_summary: Year 1550 (MDL) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1550: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1550: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61; Spain-pirates (Tunisia), 1550. Maddison records GDP/capita 1625 (ESP, 1550) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

francia.summary: Active conflicts in 1550: France-England, 1548-50. Maddison records GDP/capita 2884 (NLD, 1550) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

england.summary: Active conflicts in 1550: Scotland (with French support)-England, 1547-50; France-England, 1548-50; England (Devonshire, Catholic), 1549. Maddison records GDP/capita 1654 (GBR, 1550) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
